revision.comment: Bot: mark 1 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24122753975|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月20日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 20일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月二十]][[zh:八月二十]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 20|qq=August 20}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月二十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 20일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 20''' is the 20th day of the month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Tenji (era)|en|Tenji (era)|qid=Q1150846|lt=Tenchi|1=Tenji (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1124|en|1124|qid=Q23714|lt=1124|1=1124}} {{ill|September 29|en|September 29|qid=Q2882|lt=September 29|1=September 29}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Kiyohira|en|Fujiwara no Kiyohira|qid=Q5360232|lt=Fujiwara no Kiyohira|1=Fujiwara no Kiyohira}} established {{ill|Chūson-ji|en|Chūson-ji|qid=Q2660144|lt=Chūson-ji|1=Chūson-ji}}’s Golden Hall in {{ill|Historic Monuments and Sites of Hiraizumi|en|Historic Monuments and Sites of Hiraizumi|qid=Q2896261|lt=Hiraizumi|1=Historic Monuments and Sites of Hiraizumi}} in {{ill|Oshu|en|Oshu|qid=Q1175530|lt=Mutsu Province|1=Oshu}}. * {{ill|Kyōroku|en|Kyōroku|qid=Q1193418|lt=Kyōroku|1=Kyōroku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1528|en|1528|qid=Q6415|lt=1528|1=1528}} {{ill|September 3|en|September 3|qid=Q2860|lt=September 3|1=September 3}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Daiei (era)|en|Daiei (era)|qid=Q1193564|lt=Daiei|1=Daiei (era)}} to {{ill|Kyōroku|en|Kyōroku|qid=Q1193418|lt=Kyōroku|1=Kyōroku}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1573|en|1573|qid=Q6678|lt=1573|1=1573}} {{ill|September 16|en|September 16|qid=Q2897|lt=September 16|1=September 16}}) – In {{ill|Echizen|en|Echizen|qid=Q142836|lt=Echizen Province|1=Echizen}}, {{ill|Ichijōdani Castle|ja|一乗谷城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichijōdani Castle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 一乗谷朝倉氏遺跡|1=Ichijōdani Asakura Family Historic Ruins|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q2968274}} (the ruins of the Asakura clan) and {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|en|Asakura Yoshikage|qid=Q1322768|lt=Asakura Yoshikage|1=Asakura Yoshikage}}’s fate were sealed when he committed suicide after an attack by {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} and a family coup, leading to the demise of the {{ill|Asakura clan|en|Asakura clan|qid=Q1772267|lt=Asakura clan|1=Asakura clan}}. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1842|en|1842|qid=Q7625|lt=1842|1=1842}} {{ill|September 24|en|September 24|qid=Q2890|lt=September 24|1=September 24}}) – {{ill|Takizawa Bakin|en|Takizawa Bakin|qid=Q463142|lt=Kyokutei Bakin|1=Takizawa Bakin}} completed the 98-volume long novel {{ill|Nansō Satomi Hakkenden|en|Nansō Satomi Hakkenden|qid=Q557852|lt=Nanso Satomi Hakkenden|1=Nansō Satomi Hakkenden}}. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1843|en|1843|qid=Q7629|lt=1843|1=1843}} {{ill|September 13|en|September 13|qid=Q2848|lt=September 13|1=September 13}}) – The Rangaku scholar {{ill|Sato Taisen|ja|佐藤泰然|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sato Taisen|1=Satō Taizen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6531348}} moved to Sakura and renamed his “Wada Juku” to “Juntendō,” the precursor to {{ill|Juntendo University|en|Juntendo University|qid=Q3244340|lt=Juntendo University|1=Juntendo University}}. == Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1839|en|1839|qid=Q7616|lt=1839|1=1839}} {{ill|September 27|en|September 27|qid=Q2884|lt=September 27|1=September 27}}) – {{ill|Takasugi Shinsaku|en|Takasugi Shinsaku|qid=Q700310|lt=Takasugi Shinsaku|1=Takasugi Shinsaku}}, a proponent of the {{ill|Sonnō jōi faction|ja|尊王攘夷派|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonnō jōi faction|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 尊王攘夷|1=Sonnō jōi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1065356}} (died {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1855|en|1855|qid=Q7673|lt=1855|1=1855}} {{ill|September 30|en|September 30|qid=Q2881|lt=September 30|1=September 30}}) – {{ill|Suematsu Kenchō|en|Suematsu Kenchō|qid=Q1058300|lt=Suesho Kensumi|1=Suematsu Kenchō}}, a {{ill|Journalist|en|Journalist|qid=Q1930187|lt=journalist|1=Journalist}} and {{ill|Politician|en|Politician|qid=Q82955|lt=politician|1=Politician}} (died {{ill|1920|en|1920|qid=Q2155|lt=1920|1=1920}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1856|en|1856|qid=Q7676|lt=1856|1=1856}} {{ill|September 18|en|September 18|qid=Q2893|lt=September 18|1=September 18}}) – {{ill|Ebina Danjo|en|Ebina Danjo|qid=Q11559161|lt=Ebinadansei|1=Ebina Danjo}}, a {{ill|thinker|ja|思想家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/thinker|1=thinker|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q24885626}} and {{ill|educator|ja|教育者|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/educator|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 教育関係人物一覧|qid=Q135491417|1=Pedagogue}} (died {{ill|1937|en|1937|qid=Q18647|lt=1937|1=1937}}). * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xianfeng|1=Xianfeng Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1135843}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1859|en|1859|qid=Q7687|lt=1859|1=1859}} {{ill|September 16|en|September 16|qid=Q2897|lt=September 16|1=September 16}}) – {{ill|Yuan Shikai|en|Yuan Shikai|qid=Q210329|lt=Yuan Shikai|1=Yuan Shikai}}, later President of the {{ill|Taiwan|en|Taiwan|qid=Q865|lt=Republic of China|1=Taiwan}} (died {{ill|1916|en|1916|qid=Q2087|lt=1916|1=1916}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Ninji|ja|仁慈|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1241|en|1241|qid=Q5436|lt=1241|1=1241}} {{ill|September 26|en|September 26|qid=Q2885|lt=September 26|1=September 26}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Teika|en|Fujiwara no Teika|qid=Q378425|lt=Fujiwara Teika|1=Fujiwara no Teika}}, a celebrated {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} (born {{ill|1162|en|1162|qid=Q19667|lt=1162|1=1162}}). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1573|en|1573|qid=Q6678|lt=1573|1=1573}} {{ill|September 16|en|September 16|qid=Q2897|lt=September 16|1=September 16}}) – {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|en|Asakura Yoshikage|qid=Q1322768|lt=Asakura Yoshikage|1=Asakura Yoshikage}}<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景|qq=}}</ref>, a {{ill|busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} (born {{ill|1533|en|1533|qid=Q6443|lt=1533|1=1533}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1610|en|1610|qid=Q6765|lt=1610|1=1610}} {{ill|October 6|en|October 6|qid=Q2928|lt=October 6|1=October 6}}) – {{ill|Hosokawa Yūsai|ja|細川幽斎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosokawa Yūsai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 細川藤孝|1=Hosokawa Fujitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1207509}} (also known as Fujitaka)<ref>{{Kotobank|細川幽斎|qq=}}</ref>, a warrior and waka poet (born {{ill|1534|en|1534|qid=Q6447|lt=1534|1=1534}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 2nd year {{ill|Intercalation (timekeeping)|ja|閏 (時の計)|lt=Intercalation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Intercalation (timekeeping)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Intercalation}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1862|en|1862|qid=Q7698|lt=1862|1=1862}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|qid=Q2925|lt=October 13|1=October 13}}) – {{ill|Honma Seiichirō|ja|本間精一郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Honma Seiichirō|1=Seiichirō Honma|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11521014}}, a loyal proponent of the {{ill|Sonnō jōi|ja|尊皇攘夷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonnō jōi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 尊王攘夷}} movement and a noted {{ill|Shishi (Japan)|en|Shishi (Japan)|qid=Q2279517|lt=revolutionary patriot|1=Shishi (Japan)}} (born {{ill|1834|en|1834|qid=Q7591|lt=1834|1=1834}}). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|19|8|21|7|20|9|8|0820|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:八月廿]] {{translated page|ja|8月20日 (旧暦)|version=83645491|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[cdo:8 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:August 20 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 8월 20일]] [[ja:8月20日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:八月廿]]
[[ar:August 20 (Lunisolar)]]
<!-- (No commemorations listed) --> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh:八月二十]] [[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:八月二十]]
